Even the water that is muddy, bitter, saltish, bereft of good
taste, and of bad odour, will become clear (pure), of good taste
and good smell and endowed with other good qualities ]
[The other qualities are said to be freedom from bitter taste
and saltishness.

The following asterisms are beneficial for sinking wells : Rohini,
Pu§ya, Magha, the three Uttaras (Uttaraphalgun!, Uttarasadha
and Uttarabhadrapada), Hasta, Anuradha, Dhanistha and 6ata-
bhisaj.
One should, first of all, offer worship with oblations to Varuna
and erect a peg of banyan or Vetasa tree at the place of the vein,
having worshipped it with flowers, perfumes and incense.
